title: Surge Pricing Comes to the GPU Rental Market
title_translation: GPU租赁市场迎来价格飙升

paragraphs.source: The chart illustrating the 1y H100 rental price hardly does the trend justice – anecdotes from our first-hand experience in trying to procure compute and feedback from others in the market paints an even starker picture.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The chart illustrating the 1y H100 rental price hardly does the trend justice – anecdotes from our first-hand experience in trying to procure compute and feedback from others in the market paints an even starker picture.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The chart illustrating the 1y H100 rental price hardly does the trend justice – anecdotes from our first-hand experience in trying to procure compute and feedback from others in the market paints an even starker picture.

pro.text: 展示一年期 H100 租赁价格的图表，其实不足以充分反映这一趋势的猛烈程度——我们在尝试采购算力时的第一手见闻，加上市场其他参与者的反馈，描绘出了一幅更为严峻的画面。

applied_terms: Translate 'Surge Pricing' to capture dynamic, demand-driven spikes (e.g., 激增定价/动态加价).
Accurately render 'Neocloud Giants' (新兴云巨头) and 'open-weight models' (开放权重模型).

understanding.role_in_article: Provides empirical and anecdotal evidence of the severe supply-demand imbalance driving the price surge.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Delivers the specific, ground-level data behind the 40% surge mentioned in the intro.
understanding.relation_to_next: Prompts the historical context in the following section by showing how extreme current market conditions have become.
key_points: Fierce bidding wars are pushing spot instances to $14/hr.
Zero capacity is coming off contracts as renewals happen at 2-3 year old rates.
Blackwell availability is severely constrained, with capacity booked through late 2026.
translation_notes: Translate 'Surge Pricing' to capture dynamic, demand-driven spikes (e.g., 激增定价/动态加价).
Accurately render 'Neocloud Giants' (新兴云巨头) and 'open-weight models' (开放权重模型).

paragraphs.source: Demand is strong across many very heterogeneous use cases and there is no one-size fits all approach. There are plenty of inference workloads like large mixture of experts (MoE) inference that run best on the latest large world-size systems like the GB300 NVL72, while training workloads can have the best price performance on H100s, keeping demand high even for older cards.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Demand is strong across many very heterogeneous use cases and there is no one-size fits all approach. There are plenty of inference workloads like large mixture of experts (MoE) inference that run best on the latest large world-size systems like the GB300 NVL72, while training workloads can have the best price performance on H100s, keeping demand high even for older cards.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Demand is strong across many very heterogeneous use cases and there is no one-size fits all approach. There are plenty of inference workloads like large mixture of experts (MoE) inference that run best on the latest large world-size systems like the GB300 NVL72, while training workloads can have the best price performance on H100s, keeping demand high even for older cards.

pro.text: 在众多高度异构的应用场景中，需求依然强劲，且不存在放之四海而皆准的方案。大量推理工作负载（例如大型混合专家模型（MoE）推理）在 GB300 NVL72 等最新超大规模系统上运行效果最佳，而训练工作负载在 H100 上则能实现最佳性价比，这使得即使是老款显卡也维持着高企的需求。

pro.text: InferenceX v2：英伟达 Blackwell 对决 AMD 与 Hopper——前身为 InferenceMAX - Dylan Patel、Cam Quilici 等 5 人 · 2 月 16 日

translation_notes: Translate 'Surge Pricing' to capture dynamic, demand-driven spikes (e.g., 激增定价/动态加价).
Accurately render 'Neocloud Giants' (新兴云巨头) and 'open-weight models' (开放权重模型).

paragraphs.source: Customers are fighting to pay $14/hr/GPU for p6-b200 spot instances in AWS, some Neocloud Giants no longer sell single nodes, H100s are getting renewed at the exact same rate they were signed at 2-3 years ago and some H100 contracts are being renewed for 4 years though 2028. Hunting for even 8 nodes (64 GPUs) of H100s or H200s is not easy – half the providers we asked were completely sold out, and most providers will simply respond they have no capacity of Hopper GPUs coming off contract at all.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Customers are fighting to pay $14/hr/GPU for p6-b200 spot instances in AWS, some Neocloud Giants no longer sell single nodes, H100s are getting renewed at the exact same rate they were signed at 2-3 years ago and some H100 contracts are being renewed for 4 years though 2028. Hunting for even 8 nodes (64 GPUs) of H100s or H200s is not easy – half the providers we asked were completely sold out, and most providers will simply respond they have no capacity of Hopper GPUs coming off contract at all.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Customers are fighting to pay $14/hr/GPU for p6-b200 spot instances in AWS, some Neocloud Giants no longer sell single nodes, H100s are getting renewed at the exact same rate they were signed at 2-3 years ago and some H100 contracts are being renewed for 4 years though 2028. Hunting for even 8 nodes (64 GPUs) of H100s or H200s is not easy – half the providers we asked were completely sold out, and most providers will simply respond they have no capacity of Hopper GPUs coming off contract at all.

pro.text: 客户争相在 AWS 上以每小时每卡 14 美元的价格抢购 p6-b200 竞价实例；一些新兴算力云厂商巨头不再出售单节点；H100 正以与两三年前签订时完全相同的费率被续约，部分 H100 合同甚至一续就是 4 年，直接签到 2028 年。想要寻找哪怕只有 8 个节点（64 张 GPU）的 H100 或 H200 算力也绝非易事——我们询问的供应商中有一半已经完全售罄，而大多数供应商干脆回复称，他们根本没有任何 Hopper 架构 GPU 的合同到期释放产能。

paragraphs.source: We have even heard of renters of compute subdividing their clusters and subletting the compute just like an apartment during the Monaco Grand Prix. Coming soon – the rise of Neocloud slumlords?
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We have even heard of renters of compute subdividing their clusters and subletting the compute just like an apartment during the Monaco Grand Prix. Coming soon – the rise of Neocloud slumlords?
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We have even heard of renters of compute subdividing their clusters and subletting the compute just like an apartment during the Monaco Grand Prix. Coming soon – the rise of Neocloud slumlords?

pro.text: 我们甚至听说，有算力租户将自己的集群拆分并将算力转租出去，就像摩纳哥大奖赛期间高价转租公寓一样。即将上演的戏码——新兴算力云厂商“二房东”的崛起？

paragraphs.source: Blackwell availability is very tight too. We are hearing lead times for new Blackwell deployments now extending into June-July thanks to strong demand for open-weight models as well as the ongoing surge in inference demand, and most of these clusters are now getting taken up. Indeed, market-wide, all capacity coming online until August to September 2026 has already been booked!
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Blackwell availability is very tight too. We are hearing lead times for new Blackwell deployments now extending into June-July thanks to strong demand for open-weight models as well as the ongoing surge in inference demand, and most of these clusters are now getting taken up. Indeed, market-wide, all capacity coming online until August to September 2026 has already been booked!
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Blackwell availability is very tight too. We are hearing lead times for new Blackwell deployments now extending into June-July thanks to strong demand for open-weight models as well as the ongoing surge in inference demand, and most of these clusters are now getting taken up. Indeed, market-wide, all capacity coming online until August to September 2026 has already been booked!

pro.text: Blackwell 的可用产能同样极其吃紧。我们获悉，由于对开放权重模型的强劲需求以及推理需求的持续激增，新 Blackwell 部署的交付周期现已延长至 6 月到 7 月，且这些集群中的绝大多数已被抢购一空。事实上，放眼整个市场，直到 2026 年 8 月至 9 月上线的所有产能都已预订完毕！
